2603.18513.title: CAFlow: Adaptive-Depth Single-Step Flow Matching for Efficient Histopathology Super-Resolution
2603.18513.paper_summary: In digital pathology, whole-slide images routinely exceed gigapixel resolution, making computationally intensive generative super-resolution (SR) impractical for routine deployment. We introduce CAFlow, an adaptive-depth single-step flow-matching framework that routes each image tile to the shallowest network exit that preserves reconstruction quality. CAFlow performs flow matching in pixel-unshuffled rearranged space, reducing spatial computation by 16x while enabling direct inference. We show that dedicating half of training to exact t=0 samples is essential for single-step quality (-1.5 dB without it). The backbone, FlowResNet (1.90M parameters), mixes convolution and window self-attention blocks across four early exits spanning 3.1 to 13.3 GFLOPs. A lightweight exit classifier (~6K parameters) achieves 33% compute savings at only 0.12 dB cost. On multi-organ histopathology x4 SR, adaptive routing achieves 31.72 dB PSNR versus 31.84 dB at full depth, while the shallowest exit exceeds bicubic by +1.9 dB at 2.8x less compute than SwinIR-light. The method generalizes to held-out colon tissue with minimal quality loss (-0.02 dB), and at x8 upscaling it outperforms all comparable-compute baselines while remaining competitive with the much larger SwinIR-Medium model. Downstream nuclei segmentation confirms preservation of clinically relevant structure. The model trains in under 5 hours on a single GPU, and adaptive routing can reduce whole-slide inference from minutes to seconds.
2603.18513.paper_summary_zh: 在數位病理學中，整張幻燈片影像的解析度通常超過千億像素，使得計算密集型的生成超解析（SR）在常規部署中變得不切實際。我們介紹了CAFlow，一種自適應深度單步流匹配框架，該框架將每個影像切片路由到保留重建質量的最淺網絡出口。CAFlow在像素未打亂的重新排列空間中執行流匹配，將空間計算減少了16倍，同時啟用直接推斷。我們顯示，將一半的訓練時間專注於精確的t=0樣本對於單步質量至關重要（沒有它的情況下降低了-1.5 dB）。主幹網絡FlowResNet（1.90M參數）在四個早期出口中混合了卷積和窗口自注意力塊，涵蓋了3.1到13.3 GFLOPs。輕量級出口分類器（約6K參數）在僅0.12 dB的成本下實現了33%的計算節省。在多器官組織病理學的x4 SR中，自適應路由實現了31.72 dB的PSNR，而全深度則為31.84 dB，最淺出口的性能超過了雙三次插值，並在計算量上比SwinIR-light少了2.8倍，提升了1.9 dB。該方法在保持質量損失最小（-0.02 dB）的情況下，對未見過的結腸組織進行了泛化，並在x8放大時超越了所有可比較計算基準，同時與更大規模的SwinIR-Medium模型保持競爭力。下游細胞核分割確認了臨床相關結構的保留。該模型在單個GPU上訓練時間少於5小時，自適應路由可以將整張幻燈片的推斷時間從幾分鐘減少到幾秒。
2603.18513.author: Elad Yoshai et.al.
2603.18513.authors: Elad Yoshai, Ariel D. Yoshai, Natan T. Shaked
